description: Time snapshot was taken, in Epoch milliseconds. Same across all rows and all tables in the snapshot, and uniquely defines a particular snapshot.
name: snapshot_timestamp
created_by_user_id
description: User ID of user that initiated the transfer. Join with user_id in user table to get more user information.

name: transfer_job_name
description: Name of the Storage Transfer Service job.

name: source_workspace_namespace
description: The workspace_namespace of the source 1.0 workspace
